questions.question: и®ҫжҖ»дҪ“ $X$ жңҚд»ҺжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеё?$N\left(10,3^2\right), X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_6$ жҳҜе®ғзҡ„дёҖз»„ж ·жң? еҲ?$\bar{X}=\frac{1}{6} \sum_{i=1}^6 X_i$ жүҖжңҚд»Һзҡ„еҲҶеёғдёә ( ).

questions.analysis:
иӢ?$X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$, еҲҷж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ?$\bar{X}$ дёҺж ·жң¬ж–№е·?$S^2$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, дё”
$$
\begin{array}{cc}
\bar{X} \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{n}\right), & \frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{\sigma / \sqrt{n}} \sim N(0,1), \\
\frac{n-1}{\sigma^2} S^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), & \frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{S / \sqrt{n}} \sim t(n-1) .
\end{array}
$$

еҚ?$\frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{\sigma} \sim N(0,1)$ жҳҜй”ҷиҜҜзҡ„.

иӢҘжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$, еҲҷж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ?$\bar{X}$ дёҺж ·жң¬ж–№е·?$S^2$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, дё”

questions.question: и®ҫеңЁжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ дёӯжҠҪеҸ–дёҖе®№йҮҸдё?16 зҡ„ж ·жң? иҝҷйҮҢ $\mu, \sigma^2$ еқҮдёәжңӘзҹҘ, еҲ?$D\left(S^2\right)=()$.
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} & \text { еӣ дёә } \frac{(n-1) S^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1), D\left(\frac{(n-1) S^2}{\sigma^2}\right)=2(n-1), \text { жүҖд»?} \\ & \qquad D\left(S^2\right)=\frac{\sigma^4}{(n-1)^2} D\left(\frac{(n-1) S^2}{\sigma^2}\right)=\frac{\sigma^4}{(n-1)^2} \cdot 2(n-1)=\frac{2}{n-1} \sigma^4=\frac{2}{15} \sigma^4 .\end{aligned}$

questions.question: жҖ»дҪ“ $X$ жңҚд»ҺжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеё?$N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)(\sigma>0)$, д»ҺжҖ»дҪ“дёӯжҠҪеҸ–з®ҖеҚ•йҡҸжңәж ·жң?$X_1, \cdots, X_{2 n}(n \geq 2)$, е…¶ж ·жң¬еқҮеҖјдёә $\bar{X}=\frac{1}{2 n} \sum_{i=1}^{2 n} X_i$, еҲҷз»ҹи®ЎйҮҸ $Y=\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i+X_{n+i}-2 \bar{X}\right)^2$ зҡ„ж•°еӯҰжңҹжңӣдёә ( ).
questions.analysis:
жіЁж„ҸеҲ?$X_i+X_{n+i}$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, еҗҢеҲҶеё?$N\left(2 \mu, 2 \sigma^2\right)$, еҲҷе®ғд»¬еҸҜи®ӨдёәжҳҜеҸ–иҮӘеҗҢдёҖжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(2 \mu, 2 \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? е…¶ж ·жң¬еқҮеҖјдёә
$$
\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i+X_{n+i}\right)=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^{2 n} X_i=2 \bar{X}
$$

еҰӮжһңи®?$Z_i=X_i+X_{n+i}, i=1, \cdots, n$, еҚ?$Z_i(i=1, \cdots, n)$ жҳҜеҸ–иҮ?$N\left(2 \mu, 2 \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? дё”
$$
\frac{Y}{n-1}=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i+X_{n+i}-2 \bar{X}\right)^2=S^2(Z)
$$

еҲҷжңү $E\left(S^2(Z)\right)=\frac{1}{n-1} E(Y)=2 \sigma^2$, жүҖд»?$E(Y)=2(n-1) \sigma^2$.

ж ·жң¬ $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жқҘиҮӘжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеёғжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right), \bar{X}$ дё?$S^2$ еҲҶеҲ«жҳҜж ·жң¬еқҮеҖје’Ңж ·жң¬ж–№е·®, еҲҷдёӢйқўз»“и®әдёҚжҲҗз«Ӣзҡ„жңү ( ).

questions.question: и®?$\hat{\sigma}^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2$, е…¶дёӯ $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжқҘиҮӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? еҲ?$E\left(\hat{\sigma}^2\right)=()$.
questions.analysis: иӢ?$X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right), X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжқҘиҮ?$X$ зҡ„ж ·жң? еҲ?$\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), E\left(\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right)=n-1$,жүҖд»?$E\left(\hat{\sigma}^2\right)=\frac{n-1}{n} \sigma^2$.

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_6$ жҳҜжқҘиҮ?$N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? $S^2=\frac{1}{5} \sum_{i=1}^6\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2$, еҲ?$D\left(S^2\right)=()$.
questions.analysis: дҫқйўҳж„Ҹжңү $\sum_{i=1}^6 \frac{\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(5)$, ж•?$D\left(\sum_{i=1}^6 \frac{\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2}{\sigma^2}\right)=2 \times 5=10$, д»ҺиҖ?$D\left(S^2\right)=D\left(\frac{1}{5} \sum_{i=1}^6\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right)=\frac{10}{25} \sigma^4=\frac{2}{5} \sigma^4$.

questions.question: $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ дёәжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N(0,1)$ зҡ„дёҖдёӘж ·жң? $\bar{X}$ дёәж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ? $S^2$ дёәж ·жң¬ж–№е·? еҲҷжңү ( ).
questions.analysis:
еҜ№дәҺжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N(0,1)$, жң?$\frac{\bar{X}}{1 / \sqrt{n}} \sim N(0,1)$, $\frac{\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2}{1^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1)$, $\frac{\bar{X}}{S / \sqrt{n}} \sim t(n-1)$.

еҸҲж №жҚ?$\chi^2$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№үдёҺ $F$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№? жң?$X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(1) (i=1, 2, \cdots, n)$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣ, дё?$\frac{X_1^2/1}{\sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2 / (n-1)} = \frac{(n-1)X_1^2}{\sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2} \sim F(1, n-1)$.

questions.question: з®ҖеҚ•йҡҸжңәж ·жң?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жқҘиҮӘжҹҗжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“, $\bar{X}$ дёәж ·жң¬е№іеқҮеҖ? еҲҷдёӢиҝ°з»“и®әдёҚжҲҗз«Ӣзҡ„жҳҜ ( ).
ж ·жң¬ $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жқҘиҮӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$, жңҹжңӣеҖ?$\mu$ е·ІзҹҘ, еҲҷдёӢеҲ—з»ҹи®ЎйҮҸзҡ„еқҮеҖјдёә $\sigma^2$ зҡ„жҳҜ ( ).
questions.analysis:
еӣ дёә $\mu$ е·ІзҹҘ, жүҖд»Ҙ
$$
E\left[\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\mu\right)^2\right]=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n E\left[\left(X_i-\mu\right)^2\right]=\frac{1}{n} \cdot n \sigma^2=\sigma^2
$$
еҸҰеӨ–, еҜ№дәҺж ·жң¬ж–№е·® $S^2$, жңү
$$
\frac{(n-1) S^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1), \quad E\left[\frac{(n-1) S^2}{\sigma^2}\right]=n-1
$$
жүҖд»?$E\left(S^2\right)=E\left[\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right]=\sigma^2$.

questions.question:
и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжқҘиҮӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N(\mu, \sigma^2)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? $\bar{X}$ дёәж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ? и®°
$$S_1^2=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\bar{X})^2, \quad S_2^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\bar{X})^2$$
$$S_3^2=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\mu)^2, \quad S_4^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\mu)^2$$
еҲ?( ) жңҚд»Һ $t(n-1)$.

questions.analysis:
е°Ҷз»ҹи®ЎйҮҸж”№еҶҷжҲҗдёӢеҲ—еҪўејҸпјҡ
$$
\sqrt{\frac{n}{n+1}} \cdot \frac{X_{n+1}-\bar{X}_n}{S_n}=\frac{(X_{n+1}-\bar{X}_n) / (\sqrt{1+\frac{1}{n}} \sigma)}{\sqrt{\frac{(n-1) S_n^2}{\sigma^2} /(n-1)}} \quad (*)
$$
з”ұдәҺ $X_{n+1}$ дё?$X_i(i=1, \cdots, n)$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«ӢпјҢ
$$
\bar{X}_n=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n X_i \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{n}\right), \quad X_{n+1} \sim N(\mu, \sigma^2)
$$
жүҖд»?$X_{n+1}-\bar{X}_n \sim N\left(0,\left(1+\frac{1}{n}\right) \sigma^2\right)$пјҢд»ҺиҖҢ
$$
\frac{X_{n+1}-\bar{X}_n}{\sqrt{1+\frac{1}{n}} \sigma} \sim N(0,1)
$$
жіЁж„ҸеҲ?$\bar{X}_n$ дё?$S_n^2$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«Ӣпј?X_{n+1}$ д№ҹдёҺ $S_n^2$ зӣёдә’зӢ¬з«ӢпјҢдё”
$$
\frac{(n-1) S_n^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1)
$$
ж•…з”ұ $(*)$ ејҸеҚіеҫ—
$$
\sqrt{\frac{n}{n+1}} \cdot \frac{X_{n+1}-\bar{X}_n}{S_n} \sim t(n-1)
$$

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„дёҖдёӘж ·жң? еҲҷжңү ( ).
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} & \text { еӣ дёә } \chi^2=\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2 / \sigma^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), E\left(\chi^2\right)=n-1, D\left(\chi^2\right)=2(n-1), \text { жүҖд»?} \\ & \quad E\left[\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right]^2=\sigma^4 E\left[\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2 / \sigma^2\right]^2=\sigma^4 E\left[\chi^2\right]^2=\sigma^4\left[D\left(\chi^2\right)+\left[E\left(\chi^2\right)\right]^2\right]=\sigma^4\left[2(n-1)+(n-1)^2\right]=\left(n^2-1\right) \sigma^4 .\end{aligned}$

questions.question:
и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжқҘиҮӘжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N(\mu, \sigma^2)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? $\bar{X}$ дёәж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ? и®°
$$
S_1^2=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\bar{X})^2, S_2^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\bar{X})^2, S_3^2=\frac{1}{n-1} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\mu)^2, S_4^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n(X_i-\mu)^2
$$
еҲ?( ) жңҚд»Һ $t(n-1)$.

йҡҸжңәеҸҳйҮҸ $X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right), X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n(n>2)$ жҳҜжқҘиҮӘдәҺ $X$ зҡ„дёҖдёӘж ·жң? $\bar{X}$ дё?$S^2$ еҲҶеҲ«жҳҜж ·жң¬еқҮеҖјдёҺж ·жң¬ж–№е·®, еҲҷдёӢеҲ—з»“и®әдёӯжҲҗз«Ӣзҡ„жҳҜ ( ).
questions.analysis: иӢ?$X \sim N(\mu, \sigma^2)$, еҲ?$\bar{X} \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{n}\right), \frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{\sigma / \sqrt{n}} \sim N(0,1), \frac{n-1}{\sigma^2} S^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), \frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{S / \sqrt{n}} \sim t(n-1)$. ж №жҚ® $F$ еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№? жң?$\frac{\left(\frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{\sigma / \sqrt{n}}\right)^2}{\frac{1}{\sigma^2} S^2}=\frac{n(\bar{X}-\mu)^2}{S^2} \sim F(1, n-1)$.

questions.question: и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜжӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ зҡ„дёҖдёӘж ·жң? ж ·жң¬еқҮеҖјдёә $\bar{X}$, ж ·жң¬дәҢйҳ¶дёӯеҝғзҹ©дёә $S^2$, еҲ?$Q=(\bar{X}-\mu) /(S / \sqrt{n-1})$ жңҚд»Һ ( ).
questions.analysis: еӣ дёә $\frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{\sigma / \sqrt{n}} \sim N(0,1), \frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), S^2=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2$, дё?$\bar{X}$ дё?$S^2$ зӢ¬з«Ӣ, жүҖд»?$\frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{S / \sqrt{n-1}} \sim t(n-1)$.

questions.question: ж ·жң¬ $X_1, \cdots, X_n$ еҸ–иҮӘж ҮеҮҶжӯЈжҖҒеҲҶеё?$N(0,1)$ жҖ»дҪ“, $\bar{X}$ жҳҜж ·жң¬еқҮеҖ? $S^2$ жҳҜж ·жң¬ж–№е·? еҲҷжңү ( ).
questions.analysis:
жӯЈжҖҒжҖ»дҪ“ $N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ ж ·жң¬еқҮеҖјеҸҠж ·жң¬ж–№е·®зҡ„жҠҪж ·еҲҶеёғжңү
$$
\bar{X} \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{n}\right), \frac{n-1}{\sigma^2} S^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1), \frac{\bar{X}-\mu}{S / \sqrt{n}} \sim t(n-1)
$$

еҸҲз”ұеҚЎж–№еҲҶеёғзҡ„е®ҡд№үжңү, и®?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ жҳҜеҸ–иҮӘжҖ»дҪ“ $N(0,1)$ зҡ„ж ·жң? еҲҷз§°з»ҹи®ЎйҮҸ
$$
\chi^2=X_1^2+X_2^2+\cdots+X_n^2
$$

жңҚд»ҺиҮӘз”ұеәҰдёә $n$ зҡ?$\chi^2$ еҲҶеёғ.
еӣ жӯӨпј?$\sum_{i=1}^n X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(n)$ жҳҜжӯЈзЎ®зҡ„пјҢе…¶е®ғйҖүйЎ№й”?
